articles.title: US-Iran Agreement: A Fragile Peace In West Asia
articles.description: The US-Iran agreement signed in France has offered a potential path towards easing tensions in West Asia and restoring confidence in global energy markets. While cargo movement through the Strait of Hormuz has resumed and oil prices have softened, ongoing violence involving Israel and Hezbollah highlights the fragile nature of the current ceasefire and the challenges facing future negotiations.
